findings.description: PascalCase class `ExecutionContext` appears in the `createReader` method signature but is absent from s2 hints. It is present in s1 hints but sections should be self-contained for search purposes.
PascalCase class `Result` (return type of `handle`) and `ExecutionContext` (parameter type of `handle`) are both absent from s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: public Result handle(SqlRow inputData, ExecutionContext ctx)
